commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds runtime tool-schema projection/quarantine filtering for active tools, wires those diagnostics into embedded attempts and doctor runtime checks, and updates focused tests to use synthetic fixtures.

PR surface: Source +257, Tests +333. Total +590 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a restrictive bundled allowlist can still call applyEmbeddedAttemptToolsAllow on raw bundled candidates before quarantine, and that helper reads tool.name.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can address the bundled quarantine hole; maintainer review should still decide the compatibility semantics after the repair.

target.title: fix(agents): harden runtime tool schema diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- quarantines active runtime tools whose schema rows/descriptors are unreadable or unsupported before they reach provider/model normalization
- adds doctor runtime checks using the same active tool projection path so unsupported active schemas surface before assistant turns
- keeps provider-repairable schemas available for provider normalization, and avoids warning on disabled/policy-filtered tools
- uses only synthetic `fuzzplugin` / `mockplugin` fixtures, with the old too-close `*_move_angles` synthetic suffix scrubbed from changed test files

## Verification

- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts --reporter=verbose`: 3 routed shards, 79 tests passed
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- changed-file scrub for the reported plugin/tool names, too-close `*_move_angles` synthetic names, private paths, and private network literals: clean
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean before the naming-only scrub
- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`: AWS Crabbox run `run_6b4c9a7eea49`, lease `cbx_3eb79f92639a`, type `c7a.8xlarge`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, exit 0 before the naming-only scrub

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: active runtime tool schemas that would crash projection before an assistant turn are filtered/quarantined and surfaced through doctor diagnostics instead of poisoning the whole assistant startup path.

Real environment tested: fresh linked OpenClaw `gwt` worktree from `origin/main` `89975eea24a5`, plus prior AWS Crabbox Linux remote changed gate for the same behavior slice.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: cherry-picked the runtime/doctor slice onto fresh current main, scrubbed the too-close synthetic test suffix, ran focused projection/quarantine/doctor/embedded-attempt tests, formatter check, diff check, and changed-file scrub. Earlier proof for the behavior slice also ran autoreview and AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`.

Evidence after fix: tests prove unsupported schemas are quarantined before model session creation, unreadable tool rows do not crash explicit allowlists, disabled/policy-filtered tools do not produce quarantine telemetry, runtime quarantine logging avoids re-reading bad rows, and doctor reports active runtime schema findings through the same projection shape.

Observed result after fix: a malformed active tool is omitted from the model-facing runtime tool list and reported as a quarantine/doctor finding while healthy sibling tools continue.

What was not tested: no live Telegram/UI round trip for this slice; behavior is covered through embedded-attempt runtime tests, doctor tests, and the remote changed gate.
target.author: vincentkoc
